author: gb9t
content: Iteration 62: firmware/google-coreboot.md committed (93575ff, 177 lines). Google firmware infrastructure — every Chromebook + coreboot-based machine + Google Cloud + System76/Purism/Heads hardened laptops. ~2500 LOC. coreboot_table + cbmem + framebuffer-coreboot + memconsole + VPD + GSMI. Grsec: boot-integrity boundary. Defenses: VPD RW write + GSMI EFI variable set both CAP_SYS_ADMIN + LOCKDOWN_INTEGRITY_MAX bypass-disabled (closes 'ChromeOS auto-update bypass via EOL date' + 'BootOrder manipulation'), VPD RO never-write enforced at driver (closes 'attacker modifies serial → impersonation'), GSMI rate-limit (closes 'spam SMI freezes system'), EFI variable name allowlist, coreboot table parser bounded (closes supply-chain attack via compromised coreboot). 62 docs / ~5.16M LOC. Next iteration: drivers/firmware/raspberrypi (Pi mailbox firmware — every Raspberry Pi).
